executives.name: Angelina Mehta
executives.background: Ms. Mehta is an engineer with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles in operations, investment banking, and private equity.

executives.name: Christiane Bergevin
executives.background: Ms. Bergevin is a corporate director and former Executive Vice-President, Strategic Partnerships at Desjardins Group. She also served as President of SNC-Lavalin Capital.
